style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. At the center, a sturdy keep labelled CENTRAL CORE with a short stacked list inside reading CYBERSECURITY, IDENTITY, NETWORK, DATA. Arrows radiate outward to four small workshop boxes around it labelled MINISTRY BUILDERS. A band along the bottom reads PRONGHORN · NEXUS · VELOCITY. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:

At the center, a sturdy keep labelled CENTRAL CORE with a short stacked list inside reading CYBERSECURITY, IDENTITY, NETWORK, DATA.
